title: Imported research trace with a source-grounding interruption
goal: Resume a long document comparison without losing the evidence trail.
interruption_point: The run stopped after a weak summary and one open assumption.

events.text: Goal: Resume a long document comparison without losing the evidence trail.
Plan: Revisit the source notes, separate confirmed claims from speculation, rebuild the comparison table, then write the recommendation.
Constraint: Every recommendation claim needs a source link.
Source: notes/source_a.md says the first system retrieves memory only after restating the goal.
Source: notes/source_b.md says the second system keeps raw history for later re-checking.
Attempt: Wrote the summary before comparing the evidence. The draft was weak.
Lesson: The summary should follow the comparison table, not come first.
Next step: Rebuild the side-by-side table with claim, evidence, and risk columns.
Assumption: Both source notes use the same definition of session memory.
